message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
  NoteBorderColor #666666
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor transparent
}

actor Client
participant Service1
participant Service2

note right of Service1
SessionFactory
one per node
end note

note right of Service2
Session
one per request
end note

box "model check"
  Client -> Service1 : register(Class<Pojo>)
  activate Service1

  Service1 -> Service1 : checkModel
  Service1 -> Service1 : createModelForPojo

  alt mode="create"
    alt model exists
      Service1 --> Service1 : throw exception
    else
      Service1 -> Service1 : createModelInDB
    end
  else mode="drop-create"
    Service1 -> Service1 : dropModelInDB
    Service1 -> Service1 : createModelInDB
  else mode="update"
    Service1 -> Service1 : getModelDeltaInDB
    Service1 -> Service1 : updateModelInDB
  else mode="none"
    Service1 -> Service1 : checkModelInDB
    alt model differs
      Service1 --> Service1 : throw exception
    end
  end

  deactivate Service1
end box

Client -> Service2 : store(pojo)
activate Service2
Service2 -> Service2 : getDelta(pojo)
deactivate Service2

@enduml
